Day advanced to 2026-01-29.
15,107 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
213 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
**IMPORTANT**: 1 question(s) resolve tomorrow (2026-01-30): ['316535']. Make sure your prediction on each is up-to-date before calling next_day — stale forecasts might hurt your performance.

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 108 (117 resolved, 213 active)
- accuracy: 4.5% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -467.76
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
